data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund's NAV for January 2026 is EUR 0.5450 per unit with total value at EUR 78.2 million.
data.description: At the end of January 2026, the Baltic Horizon Fund reported a net asset value (NAV) per unit of EUR 0.5450, slightly down from EUR 0.5451 at the end of December 2025. The total net asset value of the Fund also remained constant, standing at EUR 78.2 million at year-end 2026, the same as it was at the end of December 2025.

data.title: Jane Goodall Institute USA Executive Director, Anna Rathmann, featured on Arbor Day Foundation podcast "Unearthing Optimism."
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, Anna Rathmann, the executive director of the Jane Goodall Institute USA, recently appeared on the Arbor Day Foundation's podcast "Unearthing Optimism." She discussed insights gained from Dr. Jane Goodall and her evolution from a Yellowstone park ranger to a prominent figure in global conservation. The engaging conversation with Arbor Day Foundation's CEO Dan Lambe offered inspiring perspectives. The episode sheds light on Rathmann's transformation and dedication to environmental causes.Listeners can gain valuable knowledge and motivation from Rathmann's journey.

data.title: Harvard's $56.9B endowment cuts Bitcoin ETF stake by 21%, initiates Ether exposure with BlackRock ETF.
data.description: The company overseeing the university's $56.9 billion endowment has recently taken a new position in BlackRock's Ether ETF. Concurrently, they have decreased their stake in Bitcoin ETF by 21%.

data.title: Nigel Hollis, leading expert in brand strategy, joins Delineate as Advisor. Global data and insights business.
data.description: In Llandysul, Wales on February 16, 2026, Delineate, a global data and insights company, disclosed the addition of Nigel Hollis to their team as an Advisor. Nigel, a renowned expert in brand strategy, brand equity, and marketing effectiveness, is recognized globally for his insights in these areas. This appointment signifies a valuable addition to the Delineate team, propelling their expertise in these crucial facets of the industry.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin says using prediction markets for hedging could potentially replace fiat currency. Support long-term focus.
data.description: One of the creators of Ethereum highlighted concerns regarding prediction markets, emphasizing that their overemphasis on short-term cryptocurrency predictions may lead them towards a negative trajectory referred to as 'corposlop.'

data.title: Tokenized RWAs up 13.5% amidst $1T crypto market drop. Ethereum, Arbitrum, Solana see increased activity.
data.description: Over the past 30 days, the value of tokenized real-world assets has surged by 13.5%, with Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Solana experiencing heightened activity. This growth contrasts with the broader cryptocurrency market, which suffered a $1 trillion loss in value during the same period.

data.title: InventHelp inventors from Framingham, Mass. develop new sports bag with separate compartments for convenience.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, in Pittsburgh, a new sports bag was unveiled by two inventors from Framingham, Mass. The innovators shared their motivation behind creating the SPORTS BAG, which features distinct compartments for organizing and carrying items. The design incorporates two separate sections to enhance convenience for users. This development signals a shift in the utility of sports bags, offering a more organized and efficient solution for athletes and enthusiasts alike.

data.title: NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GB300 boosts AI agents' performance by 50x. NVL72 systems provide 50x better throughput per megawatt and 35x lower token costs compared to Hopper. Microsoft and CoreWeave are deploying at scale.
data.description: The GB300 NVL72 systems developed by NVIDIA are demonstrating a remarkable improvement in performance efficiency, showing 50 times better throughput per megawatt compared to Hopper systems. Additionally, these systems are also showing a reduction of 35 times in token costs. The technology has gained significant traction with major companies such as Microsoft and CoreWeave deploying it at a large scale.

data.title: Apple to hold product event on March 4 unveiling a budget iPhone, new MacBooks, and iPads. No AI Siri expected.
data.description: On March 4, Apple will host a product event where they are expected to introduce a more affordable iPhone, along with the launch of new MacBooks and iPads. However, the integration of an AI-powered Siri is not anticipated at this event. It is anticipated that this event will showcase the latest offerings from Apple, with a focus on a budget-friendly iPhone, as well as updates to their MacBook and iPad devices. Investors and consumers are eager to see what Apple will unveil at this event, which may include significant additions to their product lineup.

data.title: Voltalia's subsidiary, Renvolt, secures a construction contract in Ireland, expanding services.
data.description: Renvolt, a subsidiary of Voltalia focused on services, has recently secured a new construction contract in Ireland. This development underscores Voltalia's growing presence in the region and highlights Renvolt's strategic expansion. The contract is valued at a significant amount, showcasing the company's commitment to providing top-notch services in the renewable energy sector. This further solidifies Voltalia's position as a key player in the industry and reinforces their dedication to sustainable practices and innovation.

data.title: Hilco Global initiating competitive sale of Francesca's brand with significant growth potential. Bids due by March 5, 2026. Stalking horse agreement with Stand Out For Good, Inc. announced.
data.description: The deadline for bids is March 5, 2026, with the auction scheduled for March 9, 2026 in New York. Francesca's Acquisition, LLC and its debtor affiliates revealed they have secured a stalking horse agreement with Stand Out For Good, Inc. on February 16, 2026. This development comes as part of the ongoing proceedings related to Francesca's.

data.title: XRP gains 3% while BTC and ETH drop; XRP at $1.47 and $89.9B market cap, BTC at $67,721.25 and $1.35T cap, ETH at $1,972.87 and $238B.
data.description: Over the past week, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has seen a 3% increase in price, reaching $1.47 with a market cap of $89.9 billion. In contrast, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) experienced a 2.3% decline, with a price of $67,721.25 and a market cap of $1.35 trillion, while Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) dropped by 3.9% to $1,972.87 with a market cap of $238 billion. Despite the overall market weakness, XRP stood out with a positive 7-day trend. Analyst Cryptoinsightuk noted that XRP displayed strong bullish momentum, resembling a Wyckoff re-accumulation pattern, signaling a potential early phase of expansion. More insights available on Benzinga.com.
